reference: I fell on my head from nine feet up a ladder on Monday morning. I iced and took Advil immediately. Besides a lot of bruising on my body from hitting the ladder on the way down, I've been feeling okay. Now, almost four days later, I'm feeling slightly dizzy. Should I go to the emergency room? No blurry vision.
